mapper.sql: id, name, code, description, css_class, list_class, is_default, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE deleted = 0
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.code}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, code FROM sys_dict_type WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_type (name, code, description, css_class, list_class, is_default, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{cssClass}, #{listClass}, #{isDefault}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_type SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, description = #{description}, css_class = #{cssClass}, list_class = #{listClass}, is_default = #{isDefault}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
